{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020438330DA0C8020609E9EFEC"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544755187823510296","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"根据目前唯一的评论来看，这确实是一个没见过的类型，收容类加天灾看过，但是只在载具上的第四天灾或收容类没见，这本书把这三点都集齐了。天灾们的活动范围小，再加上我挺喜欢这种移动式家或基地的，所以支持一波。","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":42,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420267809E9EFEC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227544755187823510296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227536971097325980734%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756651368,"group_id":"7536971097325980734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4h9GIESyhR3s6SkOGH0pO4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6f34d059301443b8bb0fef8a84d468b8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795907&x-signature=4%2F8gloD0h3dcoBvLd6QxrFQRf6o%3D","user_id":"347905630148168","user_name":"人生就像一场人生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347905630148168","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7536971097325980734","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁】+【大航海】+【沙雕玩家】+【生存冒险】+【收容异常】+【伪月计？】
杜杰带着一身诅咒和破碎记忆，成了归乡号第十二任绷带船长。
开局即地狱模式：没水没粮，船是活的，海是疯的！召唤船员？结果来了一群把惊悚航海当游戏的沙雕玩家。
好消息：船员能复活，船能靠“吃”进化，收容的异常体可以提取能源，还可以锻造成装备。
坏消息：古神在凝视，诅咒在侵蚀，玩家太能作死！不是被通缉，就是在被通缉的路上。
屠夫、销售、厨子、学生、狐娘、医生……在这艘能吞噬怪物，不断进化的诡船上，他们就是最强的矛与盾！
法术舰炮撕裂巨兽，玩家骚操作突破天际，绷带缠绕着失落的王权。
从漂泊孤舟到第四天灾舰队，他们将碾碎深海阴影，收容异常，寻找传说中的伊甸园，在古神的低语中，夺回属于人类的荣光！扬帆，起航！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o145d2a8ff8234dae06235779a29ddfd9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"洛生希","author_id":"","book_id":"7536971097325980734","book_name":"第四天灾：开局绑定诅咒收容船","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541352596800291390","read_count":"142","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"366707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"152","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,开局,克苏鲁,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o145d2a8ff8234dae06235779a29ddfd9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386678&x-signature=Ycxxn92wpFaMTb3jVrtAIGX8%2BMw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"68030046625","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020438330DA0C8020609E9EFEC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text
